title: Askellia nana

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Askellia nana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Askellia nana is often used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat coughs, colds, and other minor health complaints.
